text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is watching the Japan Cup, and
she's blown away by how aggressively Tokai Teio
and Kitasan Black run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio says that she always strives to take on
new challenges. If she were to ever stop
challenging herself, that would spell her end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing that, Satono Diamond decides that
she also wants to keep being a challenger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to take on any challenge and open a
new chapter of history for both the Umamusume
world and the Satono family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That is Satono Diamond's way of being an
illustrious runner.
